title.zh: POE 價格追蹤與 POB 裝備演算器
title.en: POE Price Tracker & POB Gear Parser

summary.zh: 把 POB 角色資料和即時物價接在一起，估算裝備價值與升級順序。
summary.en: Connects POB character data with market prices to estimate gear value and upgrade order.

challenge.zh: POB 字串是 Base64 壓縮後的 XML，裝備詞綴又有大量隨機組合。我寫了解壓和剖析流程，再把角色天賦、裝備屬性和市場價格接起來，讓估價不只看單一詞條。
challenge.en: POB data is base64-gzipped XML, and gear affixes vary a lot. I built the import parser, then connected character stats, item affixes, and live market prices so valuation does not depend on one isolated stat.

impact.zh: 玩家貼上 POB 後，可以看到整套配裝的大致市值，以及哪些裝備先升級比較划算。原本要手動查價的流程，縮到幾秒內完成。
impact.en: Players can paste a POB string, see the rough market value of a build, and find which upgrade is worth checking first.

summary.zh: 把台股權證條件整理成可篩選的工作台。
summary.en: Turns Taiwan warrant conditions into a practical screening workspace.

challenge.zh: 權證篩選要同時計算 Black-Scholes 和希臘字母，盤中報價一多，前端很容易卡住。我把定價計算和畫面更新分開，用 debounce 與 requestAnimationFrame 控制更新節奏。
challenge.en: Real-time warrant screening has to calculate Black-Scholes and Greeks while quotes keep changing. I separated pricing work from UI updates, then used debounce and requestAnimationFrame to keep the browser responsive.

impact.zh: 盤中篩選可以在一秒內回應，交易員不用在多個條件表之間來回切換，能更快找到適合的避險標的。
impact.en: The screener responds within a second during market hours, so traders do not need to jump between multiple condition tables.

summary.zh: 我每天會用的 Telegram 工作中樞，負責 TG 指令、KOL 掃描和 NotebookLM 報告連動。
summary.en: The Telegram operations hub I use every day for commands, KOL scanning, and NotebookLM report handoff.

zh: KOL 每日掃描與單日範例簡報
en: Daily KOL scan with single-day sample brief
Stock, ETF, rank, and watchlist replies

problem.zh: 每天要追 KOL、Podcast、個股、ETF、Threads 和文章時，資訊入口太分散；這個 bot 把輸入指令、NotebookLM 分析、報告連結和市場資料回覆集中到 Telegram。
problem.en: Daily KOL, podcast, stock, ETF, Threads, and article workflows were scattered across tools. This bot centralizes commands, NotebookLM analysis, report links, and market replies inside Telegram.

workflow.zh: TG 指令或排程觸發 GitHub Actions；內容工作流把網址、影片或 KOL 來源交給 NotebookLM；結果先回 Telegram 簡短結論，再附完整 HTML 報告連結。NotebookLM session 透過 NLM_COOKIE_BASE64 還原 auth.json、cookies.json 和 metadata.json。
workflow.en: Telegram commands or schedules dispatch GitHub Actions. Content workflows pass URLs, videos, or KOL sources to NotebookLM, then return a short Telegram brief plus a full HTML report link. NotebookLM sessions are restored from NLM_COOKIE_BASE64 into auth.json, cookies.json, and metadata.json.

zh: /nlm：輸入網址，回傳 NotebookLM 摘要分析
/note：產生詳細 HTML 報告連結
/stock：回傳個股健檢、技術面和產業摘要
/etf、/activeetf、/rank、/roi、/watchlist：處理 ETF、熱門排行、報酬和自選股
en: /nlm: send a URL and receive NotebookLM analysis
/note: generate a detailed HTML report link
/stock: return stock health, technicals, and industry context
/etf, /activeetf, /rank, /roi, /watchlist: handle ETF, ranking, return, and watchlist workflows

challenge.zh: Telegram 和 LINE 的 webhook 格式差很多，高流量時也會有延遲或重送問題。我做了一層 adapter，把不同訊息格式轉成同一種內部格式，並用 queue 吃掉突發流量。
challenge.en: Telegram and LINE webhooks use different message shapes, and bursts can cause retries or delays. I added an adapter layer to normalize messages and a queue to absorb traffic spikes.

impact.zh: 現在它可以處理每日大量訊息分發，也成為 KOL 簡報和其他 bot 的共用入口。
impact.en: It now handles large daily message volume and acts as the shared entry point for the KOL brief and other bots.

observability.zh: 加入 Health Check 和 webhook fallback。下游處理太慢時，系統會透過 Telegram 送出錯誤紀錄和追蹤碼。
observability.en: Adds health checks and webhook fallback. When downstream latency spikes, it sends a Telegram error log with a trace ID.

caching.zh: 用 Upstash Redis 做快取和 rate limit。Fugle、FinMind 等金融 API 的盤中重複查詢會先吃 TTL 快取，減少不必要的付費 API 呼叫。
caching.en: Uses Upstash Redis for cache and rate limiting. Duplicate Fugle, FinMind, and market queries hit TTL cache first, reducing unnecessary paid API calls.

security.zh: Webhook 端點會驗 LINE signature 和 Telegram Secret Token。NLM_COOKIE_BASE64 這類 session 金鑰放在 GitHub Secrets，執行時才注入。
security.en: Webhook endpoints verify LINE signatures and Telegram secret tokens. Sensitive values such as NLM_COOKIE_BASE64 stay in GitHub Secrets and are injected at runtime.

reproducibility.zh: 有 mock mode。沒有 Telegram Bot Token 或金融 API Key 時，也能用本地 mock server 和假資料測 adapter 邏輯。
reproducibility.en: Includes mock mode, so the adapter flow can run locally without Telegram bot tokens or market API keys.

title.zh: Price Atlas - 跨境商品查價工具

summary.zh: 同時查 Amazon US/JP、Yahoo JP、価格.com 和台灣通路，並把價格換算成台幣。
summary.en: Searches Amazon US/JP, Yahoo JP, Kakaku.com, and Taiwan shops, then converts results to TWD.

zh: 多國主流平台（台美日）一次性搜尋
即時匯率轉換 (Exchange Rate API)

problem.zh: 採購或代購在查跨國商品時，通常要開很多分頁，再自己換算匯率。流程慢，也容易漏掉匯差和運費。
problem.en: Purchasing managers and cross-border traders waste time manually searching items across multiple international sites (US/JP/TW) and calculating exchange rates, missing shipping overheads and dynamic price gaps.

workflow.zh: 前端用 SSE 發起查詢，FastAPI 後端併發抓 Amazon US/JP、Yahoo JP、価格.com 等來源，再接匯率 API 換算台幣。使用者中途取消時，後端也會停止後續查詢。
workflow.en: The UI opens an SSE connection. The FastAPI backend queries Amazon US/JP, Yahoo JP, and Kakaku.com in parallel, converts prices with an exchange-rate API, and stops work when the user cancels.

challenge.zh: 価格.com 有 Shift JIS 編碼問題，部分電商也會擋一般爬蟲。我用 curl_cffi 模擬 Chrome TLS 指紋，並在後端加上併發限制和快取，避免 API 用量失控。
challenge.en: Scraping Japanese kakaku.com required parsing raw Shift JIS bytes, and retail sites blocked standard headless clients. I used curl_cffi to match Chrome's TLS fingerprint and protected API quotas using Redis cache rules.

impact.zh: 查詢結果會邊抓邊回傳，使用者不用等全部來源跑完。取消搜尋時也能少浪費頻寬和 API 配額。
impact.en: Results stream back as each source finishes. If the user cancels, the backend avoids more scraping and API calls.

observability.zh: 用 HTML 標記指紋偵測目標網站變更。某個來源解析失敗時，會降級到備援 API，不讓整次比價中斷。
observability.en: Implements scraper self-healing with HTML markup fingerprinting. If a target platform breaks, the selector degrades and triggers backup APIs without breaking the rest of the search results.

caching.zh: 匯率和熱門商品查詢會進 Upstash Redis 一小時快取。同一商品短時間內不會一直打到目標網站。
caching.en: Uses Upstash Redis to cache currency rates and hot search queries for 1 hour, minimizing target platform hits and preventing IP bans.

security.zh: 後端用 curl_cffi 模擬 Chrome TLS/JA3 指紋，處理 Cloudflare 和部分電商的防爬限制。相關憑證只留在後端環境變數。
security.en: Uses curl_cffi to match Chrome TLS/JA3 fingerprints for sites that block normal scraper traffic. API secrets stay on the backend.

reproducibility.zh: 有 mock mode。本地端不用外網或匯率 API Key，也能用 mocks/products.json 跑完整比價流程。
reproducibility.en: Offers a mock-mode. Allows offline local simulation using mocks/products.json without external network dependencies or exchange rate API keys.

summary.zh: 把八字命理和 Gemini 分析包成可互動的 PWA。
summary.en: Combines BaZi astrology and Gemini analysis in an interactive PWA.

challenge.zh: 八字分析要處理公農曆轉換、節氣交界和五行關係，LLM 直接回答時很容易講得很空。我先把命盤資料結構化，再用受限 prompt 讓 Gemini 依照固定欄位分析。
challenge.en: BaZi analysis needs solar-lunar conversion, solar-term boundaries, and five-element relationships. I structured the chart data first, then used constrained prompts so Gemini answers from fixed fields instead of giving generic advice.

impact.zh: 使用者可以看到五行圖表和一份較完整的命理報告。PWA 可以離線開啟，基本運算不用等伺服器。
impact.en: Users get a five-element chart and a longer reading. The PWA can open offline, and basic calculation does not wait on a server.

summary.zh: 給券商 MTF 協議測試使用的跨平台 GUI 工具。
summary.en: A cross-platform GUI utility for broker MTF socket testing.

challenge.zh: MTF Socket 需要固定 heartbeat，也要正確解析 byte payload。GUI 在長時間接 TCP 資料時容易累積記憶體。我用 ArrayBuffer 處理二進位資料，並補上 connection pool 和釋放流程。
challenge.en: MTF sockets require high-frequency heartbeats and exact binary payload parsing; cross-platform GUI wrappers face memory leaks under continuous TCP streams. I parsed incoming bytes using raw ArrayBuffers and enforced a connection pool recycle mechanism.

impact.zh: 工具可以跑定時連線測試，讓交易部門不用再手動確認各券商環境是否可用。
impact.en: It supports scheduled connectivity tests, so trading ops does not need to manually check each broker environment.

summary.zh: 整合台股、海外連動與風險訊號，做成每日可看的決策儀表板。
summary.en: A daily market-health dashboard that combines Taiwan equities, global signals, and risk alerts.

challenge.zh: 三大法人、融資融券、海外指數和技術線型都在不同來源，格式也不一樣。我做了一條非同步 ETL pipeline，用 Promise.all 併發抓資料，再把結果快取到 Redis。
challenge.en: Aggregating fragmented stock data sources (institutional flows, leverage ratios, tech indicators, overseas linkages) creates processing bottlenecks. I built an asynchronous ETL pipeline using concurrent Promise.all queries with Redis caching, and modeled crash warning flags.

impact.zh: 盤後約 10 分鐘內會產出圖表和 Telegram 指標提醒，方便每天固定檢查籌碼和海外連動。
impact.en: About 10 minutes after market close, it sends charts and Telegram alerts for daily leverage and overseas-linkage checks.

observability.zh: 交易所 API 逾時或格式變動時，系統會切到備援來源，並在 Telegram 推播標註「資料來源降級」。
observability.en: If stock exchange APIs timeout or change structures, the pipeline falls back to backup sources and flags 'Data Source Degraded' in Telegram, ensuring uninterrupted daily summaries.

caching.zh: 大盤盤後資料和歷史 K 線會寫進 Redis。盤後更新一次後，後續讀取走快取，儀表板載入可壓到 80ms 內。
caching.en: Implements Redis caching for post-market data and historical charts. Cache is written once post-market, serving subsequent reads to cut dashboard load times to under 80ms.

security.zh: 金融 API key 和 Telegram Bot Token 都走環境變數管理，傳輸只走 HTTPS。
security.en: All financial credentials are stored in secure environments and transmitted via HTTPS. Telegram Bot tokens are managed via env variables to prevent exposure.

reproducibility.zh: 專案附 docker-compose，可以在本地帶起 Mock Redis 和測試伺服器，離線也能演練流程。
reproducibility.en: Includes a docker-compose environment to automatically spin up a mock Redis service and local dev server for offline simulation.

summary.zh: 分析 Shorts 爆紅比例，找出不露臉內容的潛力題材。
summary.en: Analyzes Shorts viral ratios to uncover faceless content opportunities.

challenge.zh: Shorts 的播放量和互動數據噪音很高，平台也會限制頻繁抓取。我用 proxy pool 和隨機延遲降低被擋機率，再用爆紅比例排除頻道本身的基本盤流量。
challenge.en: Shorts platforms impose aggressive rate limits, and raw view counts are noisy due to baseline subscriber traction. I built a rotation proxy pool with randomized jitter delays and implemented a custom virality ratio algorithm to isolate genuine trend virality.

impact.zh: 它分析了數千支短影音，整理出幾個不露臉內容題材，讓創作者先看數據再決定要不要投入製作。
impact.en: It analyzes thousands of Shorts and groups promising faceless-content patterns before creators spend time making videos.

summary.zh: 每日彙整 KOL 影片重點的展示頁。最初是 YouTube→NotebookLM 摘要引擎的原型，現在主要作為每日 KOL 簡報的呈現頁面，核心引擎已整合進 personal-bot-gateway。
summary.en: A page that surfaces the daily KOL video brief. Originally the prototype of a YouTube→NotebookLM summarization engine, it now mainly serves as the display surface for the daily brief — the core engine has since been folded into personal-bot-gateway.

zh: 每日 KOL 簡報展示

challenge.zh: YouTube 自動字幕常沒有標點，也會有辨識錯誤，直接丟給 LLM 摘要品質不穩。我在這個原型裡先清洗字幕、重組段落，再用 GitHub Actions 定時跑 NotebookLM handoff。這套流程後來整合進 personal-bot-gateway。
challenge.en: Auto-generated YouTube transcripts often miss punctuation and contain speech-to-text errors. This prototype cleans the transcript, rebuilds paragraph structure, and uses GitHub Actions for the NotebookLM handoff. The flow later moved into personal-bot-gateway.

impact.zh: 這個原型驗證了定時產出 KOL 影片摘要的流程。現在這頁主要負責展示每日簡報，指令和推播則交給 personal-bot-gateway。
impact.en: This prototype proved the scheduled KOL summary flow. Today the page mainly shows the daily brief, while commands and delivery live in personal-bot-gateway.

observability.zh: GitHub Actions 會檢查每個 step 狀態。YouTube API 或 NotebookLM 分析失敗時，流程會中斷並把錯誤快照送到 Telegram。
observability.en: GitHub Actions checks each step. If YouTube fetching or NotebookLM analysis fails, the runner stops and sends an error snapshot to Telegram.

caching.zh: Neon DB 和 Redis 會記錄已分析過的 YouTube 影片 ID，避免同一支影片重複送進 NotebookLM。
caching.en: Neon DB and Redis track parsed YouTube IDs, so the same video is not sent to NotebookLM again.

security.zh: DATABASE_URL 等機密不寫進程式碼。NotebookLM session 用 Base64 封裝，執行時還原 auth.json，用完後清掉。
security.en: Connection strings are not hardcoded. NotebookLM sessions are restored into auth.json at runtime and cleared after the job finishes.

reproducibility.zh: codebase 內有 tests/mocks，包含 YouTube API 回應和 NotebookLM 摘要 mock。本地端沒有 token 也能跑 pytest。
reproducibility.en: Includes tests/mocks for YouTube API responses and NotebookLM-style summaries, so pytest can run locally without tokens.

summary.zh: 把北部排球資訊整理成容易查找的指南。
summary.en: Organizes northern Taiwan volleyball information into an easy browsing guide.

challenge.zh: 北部排球場地和活動資訊散在地圖、社團和論壇裡，座標格式也不一致。我整理地點資料、轉成經緯度，並在前端建立靜態索引，讓查詢不必打 API。
challenge.en: Venue and event data was scattered across maps, groups, and forums with inconsistent coordinates. I cleaned the location data, converted it to coordinates, and built a static client-side index.

impact.zh: 它把北部數十個排球場地放進同一個 PWA，離線也能開，適合臨時查場地和活動資訊。
impact.en: The PWA puts dozens of northern Taiwan volleyball spots in one place and can still open offline.

summary.zh: 高爾夫攻略站的第一版產品原型，以老爺關西高爾夫球場作為展示與驗證案例。
summary.en: The first product prototype of a golf strategy guide, showcasing Royal Kuan-Hsi Golf Club as a validation case.

challenge.zh: 這是高爾夫攻略站的第一版，先驗證內容展示和付費攻略是否有機會。原型整理老爺關西球場公開資料與 18 洞攻略，讓球友可以快速查每一洞的配置和打法。
challenge.en: This first version tests whether a paid golf guide format makes sense. It organizes public Royal Kuan-Hsi data and 18-hole strategy notes into a static interface golfers can scan before a round.

impact.zh: 原型先把 18 洞攻略完整跑通，用來確認內容結構、閱讀順序和後續商業化方向。
impact.en: The prototype runs through all 18 holes, which was enough to check the content structure, reading flow, and next product direction.

summary.zh: 為電子供應鏈公司打造的現代企業入口。
summary.en: A modern corporate site for an electronics supply-chain business.

challenge.zh: 這個企業站用了 Bento Grid 和 Framer Motion 動效。重點是讓首頁、產品分類和公司敘事在不同螢幕上都能維持清楚的資訊層次。
challenge.en: The site uses a Bento Grid and Framer Motion. The main work was keeping the hero, product categories, and company story readable across screen sizes.

impact.zh: 網站讓公司在海外客戶面前有更乾淨的入口，也更容易拿來作為業務介紹頁。
impact.en: The site gives the company a cleaner entry point for overseas buyers and works better as a sales introduction page.

summary.zh: 重機械租賃與土方工程服務的行動友善網站。
summary.en: A mobile-friendly PWA for heavy machinery rental and earthwork services.

challenge.zh: 重機械和工程實績照片檔案很大，在工地現場用行動網路開會很慢。我把圖片轉成 AVIF/WebP，搭配漸進式載入和 Service Worker 快取。
challenge.en: Heavy machinery photos were large, and construction-site mobile networks are often slow. I converted images to AVIF/WebP and added progressive loading plus Service Worker caching.

impact.zh: 工程案例照片載入更穩，低網速環境也比較容易順利打開頁面。
impact.en: Project photos load more reliably, even on weak mobile connections.

summary.zh: 復健與物理治療診所的品牌網站。
summary.en: A brand site for a rehabilitation and physical therapy clinic.

challenge.zh: 診所網站的使用者年齡層偏高，字體、按鈕和閱讀順序都不能太吃操作。我整理 DOM 結構，讓螢幕閱讀器比較好讀，也減少 JS 體積，避免低階手機卡住。
challenge.en: The clinic's elderly patient base required compliance with WCAG accessibility guidelines and smooth performance on low-end mobile hardware. I optimized the DOM for screen readers and trimmed JS bundles to avoid UI lags on budget devices.

impact.zh: 病患可以更快找到門診、復健服務和預約資訊，低階手機也比較不容易卡住。
impact.en: Patients can get to clinic, rehab, and appointment information faster, with fewer issues on low-end phones.

summary.zh: 追蹤 MOPS 轉讓預告，提前整理籌碼異動訊號。
summary.en: Tracks MOPS transfer notices and surfaces insider-share movement signals.

challenge.zh: 公開資訊觀測站的頁面結構常微調，解析器很容易失效。我用 HTML 結構指紋監控變更，搭配容錯 regex 和 Telegram webhook 做提醒。
challenge.en: The official MOPS website modifies its HTML structure without notice, which breaks traditional scrapers. I designed a structural fingerprint checker and resilient regex fallbacks, combined with instant Telegram alerting upon schema drift.

impact.zh: 它可以在董監事股權轉讓公告出現時推播提醒，讓我提早看到籌碼異動訊號。
impact.en: It pushes insider-transfer notices when they appear, giving an earlier view of ownership movement.

title.zh: 券商測試機帳密儀表板

summary.zh: 管理多家券商測試機連線 IP 與測試帳密資訊的單一 PHP 檔案儀表板。
summary.en: A single PHP file dashboard to manage broker test account credentials, IPs, and connection status.

challenge.zh: 測試期間常要查多家券商測試機的帳密、IP 和連線狀態。這個工具用單一 PHP 檔案完成，不接資料庫，重點是讓團隊能快速部署和集中查詢。
challenge.en: During testing, broker credentials, API IPs, and connection status were scattered across notes and messages. This tool keeps them in one database-free PHP page that is easy to deploy.

impact.zh: 團隊不用再翻文件或聊天紀錄找帳密，維護和查詢時間都縮短，也減少資訊不同步的問題。
impact.en: Developers no longer need to search chat history for test credentials, and fewer copy-paste mistakes make it into local configs.

summary.zh: 把 Podcast 轉成結構化報告和心智圖，讓聽過的內容更好整理。
summary.en: Turns podcasts into structured reports and mind maps for easier review.

challenge.zh: 長 Podcast 轉錄後文字很長，直接丟給 LLM 容易超出 context，也會增加成本。我把內容切成滑動窗口先摘要，再合併主題，最後產出報告和 Mermaid 心智圖。
challenge.en: Long podcast transcripts exceed normal LLM context windows and increase token cost. I split transcripts into sliding windows, summarize each segment, merge topics, and output a Mermaid mind map.

impact.zh: 使用者可以用幾分鐘看完一集長 Podcast 的重點和心智圖，不必重新聽完整音檔。
impact.en: Users can review a long podcast through a short summary and mind map instead of replaying the full episode.

summary.zh: 整理預售屋資料，用資料角度觀察市場熱區。
summary.en: Organizes presale housing data to spot market activity patterns.

challenge.zh: 預售屋實價登錄每期資料量很大，也會混進親友交易或特殊條款。我用 Pandas 清洗資料、標準化欄位，再在資料庫建立空間索引，支援地圖查詢。
challenge.en: Raw real estate registries are bulky and contain outliers like family-transfer pricing. I wrote a Pandas preprocessing pipeline to filter anomalies, normalized the database, and built spatial indices to support rapid map coordinate queries.

impact.zh: 它把數十萬筆實價登錄整理成預售屋熱區視圖，方便比較重劃區的成交價格和溢價狀況。
impact.en: It turns registry data into a presale-housing heatmap for comparing transaction prices and premium zones.

summary.zh: 把 Windows .msg 郵件轉成 Mac 友善的 HTML。
summary.en: Converts Windows .msg email files into Mac-friendly HTML.

challenge.zh: Windows .msg 是 OLE2 二進位格式，常混 CP950 之類的非 Unicode 編碼，macOS 轉檔容易亂碼。我寫了解碼器解析 OLE2，並做中文字元集偵測和附件內嵌。
challenge.en: Windows .msg is an OLE2 structured binary containing non-Unicode character sets like CP950, causing decoding failure on macOS. I built a direct OLE2 reader with automated encoding detection and base64 attachment inline embedding.

impact.zh: Mac 使用者可以把 .msg 轉成可讀的 HTML，中文和附件都能保留下來。
impact.en: macOS users can convert .msg files into readable HTML while keeping Chinese text and attachments.

summary.zh: 用資料揭露路段估值落差與房地產風險。
summary.en: Uses local data to reveal valuation gaps and real-estate risk signals.

challenge.zh: 聯徵資料欄位多，也有不少非結構化金融名詞。我做了多因子評估，把路段成交價和區域信用槓桿放在一起比較，再用 Chart.js 呈現風險分布。
challenge.en: Evaluating property volatility requires parsing raw JCIC financial registry tables and modeling complex credit correlations. I designed a multi-factor risk evaluator connecting local transacted values with regional leverage stats, rendered via dynamic 3D radars.

impact.zh: 它讓購屋前可以先看路段估值和槓桿風險，避免只看成交價就下判斷。
impact.en: Home buyers can compare street-level valuation and leverage risk before making a decision.

summary.zh: 用 AI 分析財經新聞情緒並整理成投資觀察。
summary.en: Uses AI to analyze financial-news sentiment and produce market observations.

challenge.zh: 財經新聞常有誇大標題，直接讓 LLM 判斷容易失真。我用 two-stage prompting，先抽出實際提到的上市公司段落，再做多因子情緒評分。
challenge.en: Financial news articles contain market noise and sensational headlines, leading to LLM hallucination. I structured a two-stage prompting pattern that first isolates text blocks mentioning specific tickers, then performs multi-factor sentiment scoring.

impact.zh: 情緒訊號可以拿來輔助強勢股篩選；在回測裡，加入新聞情緒後回撤比單純價格條件低。
impact.en: In backtests, adding the news sentiment filter reduced drawdowns compared with price-only momentum conditions.

summary.zh: 快速試算二代健保補充保費和眷屬負擔。
summary.en: Calculates Taiwan NHI supplemental premiums and dependent costs.

challenge.zh: 二代健保計算牽涉投保類別、眷屬人數上限、級距差額和扣繳費率。為了避免浮點數誤差，我用精確代數處理金額，並補上邊界條件測試。
challenge.en: Taiwan's NHI premium rules feature nested brackets, dependent headcounts, and dynamic calculation rates. I used a high-precision decimal math library to eliminate rounding errors and implemented complete unit test suites covering edge cases.

impact.zh: 工具已累積數千次試算，適合人資或員工快速確認補充保費與眷屬負擔。
impact.en: The tool has handled thousands of calculations and is useful for HR teams or employees checking supplemental premiums.

summary.zh: 把兩個目錄的設定差異視覺化，減少人工比對時間。
summary.en: Visualizes configuration differences across directories to reduce manual comparison.

challenge.zh: 大型 JSON 或 YAML 直接在主執行緒比對時，畫面很容易凍住。我把 diff 計算移到 Web Worker，並用 virtual scroll 只渲染可見的變更行。
challenge.en: Running directory-wide comparison algorithms on large configuration files in-browser caused UI thread freezes. I offloaded the Myer's Diff calculations to a Web Worker and implemented virtual scrolling to render visible line changes only.

impact.zh: 大型設定檔比對可以在幾秒內完成，上線前的設定稽核不用再手動逐行看。
impact.en: Large config comparisons finish in a few seconds, so deployment audits no longer require manual line-by-line review.

summary.zh: 把聚餐、下午茶、投票和費用整理成團隊儀表板。
summary.en: Organizes team meals, drink orders, voting, and expense records.

challenge.zh: 多人點餐常會重複登記、拆帳麻煩，歷史紀錄也容易散掉。這個版本以 LocalStorage 為主，保留 Firebase 作為可選整合，先把投票、回報與費用紀錄集中到同一個介面。
challenge.en: Group ordering creates duplicate entries, messy bill records, and scattered history. This version uses LocalStorage by default, keeps Firebase as an optional integration, and puts voting, check-ins, and expense history in one interface.

impact.zh: 部門聚餐和下午茶紀錄不用再散在聊天訊息裡，後續要查店家、費用或回報狀態會快很多。
impact.en: Team meal and drink-order records no longer live only in chat messages, so restaurant history, expense notes, and check-in status are easier to find later.

summary.zh: 用 FastAPI 和 Scikit-learn 做即時手寫數字辨識。
summary.en: A FastAPI and Scikit-learn app for real-time handwritten digit recognition.

challenge.zh: Canvas 手寫輸入的粗細和邊距差很多，直接送進 MLP 容易辨識錯。我在後端用 OpenCV 做質心對齊、降噪和 28x28 正規化。
challenge.en: Handwritten digits drawn on raw HTML5 canvas have varying line weights and margins, leading to neural network misclassification. I used OpenCV to perform centroid alignment, Gaussian noise reduction, and 28x28 normalization before inference.

impact.zh: 前處理後辨識穩定很多，畫完數字後可以很快看到結果。
impact.en: After preprocessing, recognition is much more stable and results return quickly after drawing.

summary.zh: 探索 FastAPI、PydanticAI、MCP 和串流聊天流程。
summary.en: Explores FastAPI, PydanticAI, MCP, and streaming chat workflows.

challenge.zh: 在 FastAPI 裡接 PydanticAI 時，需要處理多 agent 狀態，也要把過程用 SSE 串流回前端。我寫了自訂 SSE generator 和非同步 tool calling 連線池。
challenge.en: Integrating PydanticAI with FastAPI requires managing multi-agent runtimes and streaming raw LLM tokens via Server-Sent Events (SSE). I implemented custom async generators and managed connection pools for concurrent Tool Calling.

impact.zh: 這個專案跑通了 MCP 多 agent 對話原型，後續要做更複雜的 AI 後端時，可以直接拿這套結構改。
impact.en: This project gets an MCP multi-agent chat prototype running, and the same structure can be reused for more complex AI backends.

title.zh: AI 培訓課程回顧平台

summary.zh: 讓學員快速找到每週 AI 課程的投影片、範例程式碼和補充資源。
summary.en: A course review page where students can find weekly AI training slides, sample code, and extra resources.

challenge.zh: AI 培訓課程跨好幾週，投影片、範例程式碼和補充資源散在不同地方。這個頁面把資料按日期整理成卡片，讓學員課後能直接回來找資源。
challenge.en: The course ran for several weeks, and slides, sample code, and extra resources ended up scattered. This page groups materials by date so students can find them after class.

impact.zh: 學員可以從同一頁打開投影片和程式碼，課後複習不用再回頭翻訊息或信件。
impact.en: Students can open slides and code from one page instead of digging through chat messages or emails.

summary.zh: 用三代理人辯論流程輔助聰明錢交易分析。
summary.en: Uses a three-agent debate flow to support smart-money-concept trading analysis.

challenge.zh: SMC 裡的 BOS、CHoCH 和 Order Block 很容易被雜訊影響。我用多級 fractal 過濾 K 線特徵，再讓牛方、熊方和裁判三個 agent 進行多輪辯論。
challenge.en: Spotting Smart Money Concepts (SMC) structure breaks (BOS, CHoCH) is highly error-prone due to candlestick market noise. I developed a multi-level fractal filter to clean price feeds and deployed a multi-agent debate chain (bull/bear/referee) for signal voting.

impact.zh: 報告會保留多方推理過程，比單一 LLM 直接給結論更容易檢查訊號是否站得住。
impact.en: The report keeps the bull, bear, and referee reasoning visible, making signals easier to review than a single direct LLM answer.

summary.zh: 給台灣出發旅客用的機票、飯店和套裝行程比價工具，預設先跑爬蟲，必要時才用 API 後備。
summary.en: A search tool for Taiwan-departure flights, hotels, and tour packages. It tries scrapers first and only uses API fallback when needed.

zh: 機票/飯店/行程併行比價
爬蟲優先零 API 成本

challenge.zh: Google Flights、Booking.com 和旅行社資料格式不一，爬蟲也可能失敗。我用 Promise.allSettled 併行抓機票、飯店和行程，結果寫入 Upstash Redis 當日快取；爬蟲落空時才讓使用者選 SerpAPI 後備。
challenge.en: Travel data sources (Google Flights, Booking.com, agencies) are fragmented and scrapers fail unpredictably. I built a dual-track architecture: fetching flights, hotels, and packages concurrently via Promise.allSettled, caching results in Upstash Redis day-scoped, and only triggering a quota-guarded SerpAPI fallback when scraping returns empty.

impact.zh: 同日相同查詢命中快取時，100ms 內可回傳。SerpAPI 只有在使用者主動點後備時才會扣每日 10 次配額。
impact.en: Same-day repeat queries return from cache in under 100ms at zero per-query API cost, with SerpAPI's 10-calls/day quota only consumed on explicit user fallback.

observability.zh: 頁面會顯示當日 SerpAPI 剩餘配額。只有爬蟲落空時，才出現「使用後備 API」按鈕。
observability.en: The page surfaces remaining daily SerpAPI quota in real time and only reveals a 'Use Fallback API' button when scraping returns empty, keeping data source and cost transparent per query.

caching.zh: 用 Upstash Redis KV 做 day-scoped 快取，同日相同查詢直接命中。GitHub Actions 每天 03:00 UTC 先暖快取。
caching.en: Uses Upstash Redis KV for day-scoped caching so identical same-day queries hit instantly, with a GitHub Actions cron warming the cache daily at 03:00 UTC to cut cold-start latency.

security.zh: SerpAPI key 和快取憑證都用環境變數。爬蟲服務在 Render，前端與 API route 在 Vercel。
security.en: SerpAPI keys and cache credentials are managed via environment variables, with the scraper on Render and the frontend/API routes on Vercel for clear separation of concerns.

reproducibility.zh: FastAPI 爬蟲服務附 Dockerfile 和 render.yaml。docs/ 裡有系統架構、搜尋流程和部署圖。
reproducibility.en: The FastAPI scraper includes a Dockerfile and render.yaml. docs/ covers the architecture, search flow, and deployment diagrams.

summary.zh: 整理台股處置股、注意股、即將出關和注意自結清單，並顯示風險分數與出關倒數。
summary.en: A Taiwan-stock disposal and watch-list board with risk scores, active disposal names, soon-to-clear names, and clearance countdowns.

zh: 處置日 + 即時報價雙層快取

challenge.zh: 處置和注意股資料散在證交所與櫃買中心公告，瀏覽器也不能直接跨域抓。我用 Next.js Route Handler 在 server 端併行抓 TWSE/TPEX OpenAPI 與 Yahoo 報價，再用純函式計算風險分數、漲跌停價和出關倒數。
challenge.en: Taiwan disposal/watch-list data is scattered across TWSE and TPEX announcements and blocks browser CORS. I built a Next.js Route Handler that concurrently fetches TWSE/TPEX OpenAPI plus Yahoo quotes server-side, then runs a market-agnostic pure-function engine that applies the official disposal rules (3-in-a-row / 6-in-10 / 12-in-30 days) to compute risk scores, limit prices, and clearance countdowns.

impact.zh: 名單以處置日為鍵，台北 18:00 換日後才重抓；即時報價保留 20 秒新鮮度。任一資料源失敗時會降級，看板不會整頁掛掉。
impact.en: Lists are cached by disposal day, rolling over at 18:00 Taipei time. Live quotes stay fresh for 20 seconds, and source failures fall back instead of taking down the whole board.
